nasb.text: But to the tribe of Levi, Moses did not give an inheritance; the Lord, the God of Israel, is their inheritance, as He had promised to them.

esv.text: But to the tribe of Levi Moses gave no inheritance; the Lord God of Israel is their inheritance, just as he said to them.

cnv.text: 可是利未支派，摩西卻沒有把產業分給他們，因為耶和華以色列的　神就是他們的產業，正如耶和華對他們所說的。

ccb.text: 摩西并没有分给利未支派任何产业，因为以色列的上帝耶和华就是他们的产业，正如耶和华对他们的应许。
